items.title: Wonder if the Lakers could somehow dump Vando in this scenario. Offset Stewart’s cap impact while bolstering center depth in the process.

items.title: Doesn’t fix everything as they would still need other wing help, but a Kessler/ Ayo offseason would be pretty ideal. A ton of things probably need to happen though like LeBron discount, dumping Vando/Knecht, Kessler rfa obstacle, etc.
